tweets.text:
We will NOT tolerate terrorist sympathizers. To make America safe again, USCIS will consider aliens’ antisemitic activity on social media and the physical harassment of Jewish individuals as grounds for denying immigration benefit requests.
Learn more: 
https://t.co/jyopRVuSQH
tweets.text_resolved:

Learn more: 
https://www.uscis.gov/newsroom/news-releases/dhs-to-begin-screening-aliens-social-media-activity-for-antisemitism

tweets.text: Unforeseen circumstances, such as hurricanes, wildfires, or severe weather, can sometimes affect the processing of your USCIS application, petition, or immigration request. Learn about your options when the unexpected happens: https://t.co/IAp0FDJr3i https://t.co/pCXPOhuScQ

tweets.text: If you’re an alien in the United States, you must register with the federal government. Learn who this affects, how to register, and the penalties for not complying here: https://t.co/zdqiWcsYwf https://t.co/6153FW8UoP

tweets.text: USCIS has a robust social media vetting program to identify national security & public safety risks that now includes antisemitism. EVERYONE should be on notice. If you’re a guest in our country – act like it. (2/2)
tweets.text_resolved: USCIS has a robust social media vetting program to identify national security & public safety risks that now includes antisemitism. EVERYONE should be on notice. If you’re a guest in our country – act like it. (2/2)

tweets.text: From terror threats to gang membership to the embrace of any kind of violent ideology, USCIS is on watch to find anything online that poses a threat to our nation & our way of life. (1/2)
tweets.text_resolved: From terror threats to gang membership to the embrace of any kind of violent ideology, USCIS is on watch to find anything online that poses a threat to our nation & our way of life. (1/2)

tweets.text: Have you moved? If you have filed an immigration benefit request with USCIS, you must notify us of your new address within 10 days of the change. Update your address as soon as possible. To learn more, visit: https://t.co/gjWy0LyrCw https://t.co/usC0D1REEG

tweets.text: We helped @ICEgov & @FBITampa with the arrest of this Uzbek national in Orlando who tried to cheat the system with marriage fraud. Now he's behind bars. Marriage fraud is a federal crime. You game the system--@DHSgov will find you. We're upholding the law & making America safe.

tweets.text:
Thinking of selling fake documents? Think again. You may find yourself in court facing jail time, monetary fines, or even deportation, like this Brazilian national who was arrested for selling fake green cards and social security cards. 
Learn more: https://t.co/VoWSm6sk8Z https://t.co/5yxLZpFewk
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text: Making America safe under @Sec_Noem looks like this: We worked with @ICEgov to arrest a violent criminal in Orlando. He was ordered deported 20 years ago but never left. Later, he was convicted of battery of a law enforcement officer. This fugitive is now off the streets https://t.co/alMnMAhSvp

tweets.text: Immigration benefits are a privilege & lying to gain access to the U.S. has consequences. A former mayor of Les Irois, Haiti lied about his violent past & was convicted for visa fraud. tweets.text: USCIS will not deny any adjustment of status application based on an alien not presenting documentation that they received the COVID-19 vaccination. Learn more: https://t.co/6WLGit3ULr

tweets.text:
Alien Registration Registrants: if you move, changing your address with @USPS won't change your address with USCIS. Update your information with USCIS within 10 days to avoid penalties, you may submit your address change through your myUSCIS account. 
https://t.co/24RdvaRTOZ https://t.co/9bQeKM1vFn
